artifact: flagship v4 G1-panel-on-v1 de-risk (V4_FLAGSHIP_DESIGN 17.1b) — checkpoint-based G1 secondaries reproduced against the archived v1 checkpoint
why: v1's answers are all published, so any panel that does NOT reproduce them is a panel bug, caught for ~0 training GPU before v4 trains a step.

provenance.harness: real run_gate.py + real taniteval driving eval
provenance.pod: tanitad-eval (194.68.245.76), GPU idle, gpu_lock v4-g1-panel acquired then released

wm_canary_ade_2s.note: for v1 (no diffusion planner) the deployed grounded-operative-rollout ADE IS the canary path; heldout.model.ade_0_2s 0.4522 rounds to the design's 0.452

speed_benefit_recovered_frac.computed: local reducer over in-repo trainlogs (nospeed 0.5740, v1 0.1051), zero GPU

panel_findings: NAME: the miss metric is emitted as 'miss_rate@2m' (this JSON) / 'miss_2m' (current driving.py) — the gate card wants 'miss_at_2m'. A 3-way name drift; the P7/P8 emitter-rename must reconcile all three (extends O-08).

ESTIMATOR: flagship-30k.json has NO 'cluster_bootstrap' block, so run_gate._read_eval_metric falls back to the DEPRECATED 'heldout (overlapping_holdout_se)' for the primary. v4's eval JSON MUST emit a cluster_bootstrap block or every gate reads the estimator CLAUDE.md forbids (measured 1.28-2.06x too narrow).

REPORT-ONLY DROP (confirmed dev-box + pod): run_gate.py check only iterates card.secondary, so the 5 report-only falsifiers supplied via --secondary-value are silently discarded — not emitted to the gate JSON as design 9 claims. P8 must add a report-only channel.

gate_output.reason: all pre-registered gates pass (this validates the INSTRUMENT on v1, not v1 itself)
